description: Transnational Albanian-speaking cocaine-trafficking network that organized shipments from South America to Europe and coordinated wholesale distribution across EU member states. It was dismantled in 2020 after a five-year investigation codenamed Operation Los Blancos, resulting in over 100 arrests and seizures of nearly 4 tonnes of cocaine. The network negotiated directly with South American cartels and used encrypted communications and informal value transfer systems.

country_links.evidence_quote: Independent reporting has widely linked Dritan Rexhepi, an Albanian national ... to the orchestration of the network from Ecuador
country_links.context: The network's leader operated from Ecuador, orchestrating the network from there.

country_links.evidence_quote: the wider investigation recorded 84 arrests in Italy, Ecuador, the Netherlands, the United Kingdom , Switzerland and Germany
country_links.context: The wider investigation recorded arrests in Germany, indicating the network's presence there.

country_links.evidence_quote: oversaw downstream distribution via accomplices in Italy , the Netherlands , Albania and other countries
country_links.context: The network oversaw downstream distribution via accomplices in Italy.
